mnemonics.title: L1 vs L2
mnemonics.content: L1 LASSO (Lots of Absolute Shrinkage Selects Zeroes), L2 Ridge (Reduces weights Gradually)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine L1 as diamond-shaped constraint (sparse corners) vs L2 as circular constraint (smooth boundary)

analogies.analogy: Like training wheels on a bike - constraints that prevent extreme maneuvers (overfitting) while learning
